sc.dei.s: 2023 ESG report states 45% women in leadership; HRC CEI score 100 (2023, 2024).
sc.environment.s: No verified B Corp certification, science-based targets, or EPA enforcement actions found.
sc.labor.s: No NLRB findings, OSHA fatalities, or major class-action settlements documented.

sc.privacy.s: No documented HIBP breaches or FTC privacy enforcement actions found.
